character_bible: ORIGINAL character robot named 'CARGO' (do NOT depict WALL-E, EVE, or any Disney/Pixar character). Design bible: squat rectangular chassis painted dusty teal with a faded orange hazard stripe around the midsection; two short rubber tank treads; a single multi-joint arm ending in a three-finger claw; a head made of two stacked hexagonal camera lenses on a short springy stalk (not binocular tubes); a small solar sail folded on the back like a backpack panel; a cargo basket welded to the rear with scuffed stickers; expressive but non-copycat face — hexagonal eyes can tilt independently; charming quiet personality, slightly weathered utility bot. WORLD: neon cyberpunk night city — rain-slick streets, magenta/cyan signage, holograms, wet reflections. Keep CARGO's teal/orange design readable against neon. Visual style: high-quality animated feature film meets cyberpunk, soft volumetric light, gentle character focus, 16:9.

concepts.title: CARGO pays for a neon solar/charge kiosk
concepts.image_prompt: ORIGINAL character robot named 'CARGO' (do NOT depict WALL-E, EVE, or any Disney/Pixar character). Design bible: squat rectangular chassis painted dusty teal with a faded orange hazard stripe around the midsection; two short rubber tank treads; a single multi-joint arm ending in a three-finger claw; a head made of two stacked hexagonal camera lenses on a short springy stalk (not binocular tubes); a small solar sail folded on the back like a backpack panel; a cargo basket welded to the rear with scuffed stickers; expressive but non-copycat face — hexagonal eyes can tilt independently; charming quiet personality, slightly weathered utility bot. WORLD: neon cyberpunk night city — rain-slick streets, magenta/cyan signage, holograms, wet reflections. Keep CARGO's teal/orange design readable against neon. Visual style: high-quality animated feature film meets cyberpunk, soft volumetric light, gentle character focus, 16:9. Night alley charge kiosk under a flickering hologram that says CHARGE. CARGO extends its three-finger claw with a scuffed payment fob toward a glowing NFC pillar; thick cable coiled like a snake of light. Rain, neon reflections, quiet commerce moment.
concepts.motion_prompt: CARGO taps the fob, pillar pulses cyan approval, cable snakes into a side port under the orange stripe, hex eyes tilt at the hologram, soft rain streaks, gentle cinematic push-in
